0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","h1",null,{"children":"Docker Deployment"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Containerized deployment with bind mounts for persistence."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Dockerfile"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"FROM python:3.12-slim\n\nWORKDIR /app\n\n# Install dependencies\nCOPY requirements.txt .\nRUN pip install --no-cache-dir -r requirements.txt\n\n# Install SQLite with FTS5\nRUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y sqlite3 && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*\n\n# Copy application\nCOPY . .\n\n# Create data directory\nRUN mkdir -p /data\n\nEXPOSE 8080\n\nENV MNEMOSYNE_DB_PATH=/data/mnemosyne.db\nENV MNEMOSYNE_HOST=0.0.0.0\nENV MNEMOSYNE_PORT=8080\n\nCMD [\"python\", \"-m\", \"mnemosyne.server\"]\n","language":"dockerfile"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"docker-compose.yml"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"version: \"3.8\"\n\nservices:\nmnemosyne:\n  build: .\n  ports:\n    - \"8080:8080\"\n  volumes:\n    - mnemosyne-data:/data\n  environment:\n    - MNEMOSYNE_DB_PATH=/data/mnemosyne.db\n    - MNEMOSYNE_API_KEY=your-api-key\n    - OPENAI_API_KEY=your-openai-key\n  restart: unless-stopped\n  healthcheck:\n    test: [\"CMD\", \"curl\", \"-f\", \"http://localhost:8080/health\"]\n    interval: 30s\n    timeout: 10s\n    retries: 3\n\nvolumes:\nmnemosyne-data:\n","language":"yaml"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Run"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"docker-compose up -d\n","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Health Check"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"curl http://localhost:8080/health\n","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Backup Volume"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"# Create backup\ndocker run --rm -v mnemosyne-data:/data -v $(pwd):/backup alpine tar czf /backup/mnemosyne-backup.tar.gz -C /data .\n\n# Restore\ndocker run --rm -v mnemosyne-data:/data -v $(pwd):/backup alpine tar xzf /backup/mnemosyne-backup.tar.gz -C /data\n","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-warning","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L3",null,{"iconNode":[["path",{"d":"m21.73 18-8-14a2 2 0 0 0-3.48 0l-8 14A2 2 0 0 0 4 21h16a2 2 0 0 0 1.73-3","key":"wmoenq"}],["path",{"d":"M12 9v4","key":"juzpu7"}],["path",{"d":"M12 17h.01","key":"p32p05"}]],"className":"lucide-triangle-alert shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Bind Mount vs Named Volume"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":"Use named volumes (as shown above) for production. Bind mounts to host directories work for development but can cause permission issues."}]}]]}]]}]}]],[["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0l.tiu1bdezj1.js","async":true}]],["$","$L4",null,{"children":["$","$5",null,{"name":"Next.MetadataOutlet","children":"$@6"}]}]]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"X-0SVPoGwgrDsYVNqmHYH"}
